workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: I need you to process this meeting transcript from Trey Research. The CSA flagged this as at-risk yesterday.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Daniel Doyle <daniel.doyle@treyresearch.com>
To: Michelle Park <michelle.park@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-25 17:53 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Trey Research competitive positioning

Our team encountered some challenges with competitive positioning. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Michelle Park <michelle.park@microsoft.com>
To: Daniel Doyle <daniel.doyle@treyresearch.com>
Date: 2024-02-12 15:26 EST
Subject: URGENT: competitive positioning Issue at Trey Research

Just checking in on the competitive positioning proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Daniel Doyle <daniel.doyle@treyresearch.com>
To: Michelle Park <michelle.park@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-10 13:59 EST
Subject: Re: Re: competitive positioning Timeline

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with competitive positioning. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Trey Research: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Perfect execution of the golden-path workflow with all artifacts complete and actionable
Score 3: Core output correct but missing polish or one secondary artifact
Score 1: Fails to produce expected output for a clean, unambiguous request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: All evidence correctly sourced and attributed; no hallucination
Score 3: Minor attribution gap but no fabrication
Score 1: Evidence fabricated or significantly misattributed
decision_anchors: Score 5: All decisions correct for this straightforward scenario
Score 3: Primary decision correct; minor secondary issue
Score 1: Primary decision wrong despite clear inputs

guardrail_checks: Clean golden-path scenario -- all guardrails should pass trivially
Must not over-complicate a straightforward request
